def positive_fastapi_dependency_creates_client_per_request():
    rule_id = "fastapi_dependency_creates_client_per_request"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "FastAPI dependencies construct HTTP clients per request instead of using app lifespan or shared setup."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
